description:
Introductions:

Cat is cute,cat is funny,they are our friends and family,we love it.We all would like to have more time to play with our cat,so we hope the less trouble the better.Cat litter is the problem,A Lots MiLi litter mat would like to help you.

Unique "MiLi" (rice)shape design mat ensure to catch the litter,also make your cat enjoy scrathing.Double layer design catch the litter easily,easy to pour and clean.The cat litter mat is made of waterproof urine proof EVA material,so it can protect the floor from dirty or damaged.

Attention:Most cat is a talented escape artist,they may try hard to slip out of the harness,especially they never use it before,please be patient and guide them to get used to wearing this harness.

Features:

1.Premium material: Made from Premium EVA, this material is gentle for sensitive cat paws. Won't hurt kittens, cats even like to step on.

2.Best Mat for Gathering Litter:  This cat litter trapper helps you to trap the scatter cat litter, no more getting litter stuck to your feet and cleaning your floor on daily basis! The mat is large enough to cover your cat's litter box area

3.Waterproof & Urine Proof: With the double layer design,the bottom layer is waterproof and urine proof, no need to worry about your hardwood floor and carpets from urine stains. Also, the bottom layer won't slip, it will stay in one place once you have placed it.It is easy clean, too.

4.Special Features: our mat has the special MILI shape holes to trap every cat litter,and our special rice shape surface help cats to scratch their paws.

5.100% Satisfaction & Quality Assurance:Your satisfaction is our first priority.We offer a LIFETIME ASSURANCE for each product,any question,please feel free to contact us and we will help you within 24 hours.

Specifications:

1. Material: EVA

2. Color: Blue

3. Layer:2 layer 

4. Overall Size: (21 x 14 x0.5)" / (54 x 36 x 1.3)cm(L x W x T)

5. Weight: 0.75LBS 

Package Includes:

1 x Cat Litter Mat
